name: Medical Services Remuneration Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applicable tax-exempt organizations employing highly compensated doctors or veterinarians can exclude the portion of pay related to direct medical care from excise tax calculations.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Remuneration paid to licensed medical professionals (including veterinarians) for the performance of medical or veterinary services is excluded from the calculation of the $1,000,000 compensation threshold.
